arts.ttl: Chelsea news: Axel Disasi REJECTS Tottenham despite transfer agreement
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur have agreed a deal to sign Axel Disasi on loan until the end of the season, but the Chelsea star has reportedly rejected the move. Tottenham have recently ramped up talks to sign Disasi on a short-term deal until the end of the campaign and they have now reached an agreement with Chelsea, according to Fabrizio Romano.

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news LIVE - Axel Disasi stand-off, Alejandro Garnacho update, Cesare Casadei exit - football.london
arts.sum: “I think Villa will be able to do a deal if they wanted after selling Duran, but it doesn’t mean that they didn’t have a PSR problem in the first place. Former sports lawyer Stefan Borson has explained the state of Villa's finances as they look to sign Disasi and Felix.

arts.ttl: Chelsea’s Axel Disasi turns down Tottenham move
arts.sum: According to a report from Fabrizio Romano, Chelsea have accepted an offer from Tottenham Hotspur to take Axel Disasi (26) on loan. However, the player has rejected this approach as…

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Blues to repeat Cole Palmer trick with Nico O'Reilly
arts.sum: O’Reilly has only made six senior appearances for Pep Guardiola’s side, but Chelsea are eyeing a late move for the 19-year-old as they continue scouting the best young talents in world football. Chelsea are reportedly working on a deal to sign Manchester City youngster Nico O’Reilly amid their pursuit of a new central midfielder.

arts.ttl: Pedro Neto reveals ultimate Chelsea ambition as Enzo Maresca point made
arts.sum: Speaking to the Chelsea website, the former Wolves man said: "I want to do better, to be honest. The goal is to do my best, improve and reach my level.

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Blues to have 'free run' at 27-year-old despite Man United competition?
arts.sum: Manchester United reportedly join Chelsea in the race to sign Borussia Dortmund goalkeeper Gregor Kobel, whom the Red Devils have a 'long-standing' interest in.

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano Transfer News: SHOCK Man Utd target, Arsenal Cunha BOMB, CRAZY Chelsea plan
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano has provided some massive updates on the biggest transfer stories from around Europe, including the latest on Man Utd's pursuit of offensive reinforcements, Chelsea's 'crazy' plan for the final days of the window and the bombshell detail in Matheus Cunha's new contract. Speaking on his YouTube channel, Romano has confirmed that Aston Villa have reached an agreement to sign Man Utd outcast Marcus Rashford while he also provided an update on the Birmingham club's ongoing pursuit of Marco Asensio and Joao Felix.
